{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112582340D63CB8016FE4E84A72"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7582852202132718398","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"尊重历史，分析透彻，合情合理！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765524419,"group_id":"7579153688355146776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxau6eZ1b7Jqx1OkFYgawfRdrRIzisKU6rSA4fMdiO/p","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2307232373937643","user_name":"喜欢潮虫子的伏魔军"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2307232373937643","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579153688355146776","book_info":{"abstract":"道光年间的紫禁城，一场 “家族企业继承人选拔” 悄然落幕 —— 腿疾缠身、才智平平的奕詝，凭 “仁孝” 人设逆袭聪慧过人的弟弟奕䜣，登上了大清帝国的龙椅，改元咸丰。
他本想做个守成明君，却偏偏撞上了中国历史上最离谱的 “逆风局”：刚收拾完道光留下的烂摊子，太平天国的惊雷就在南方炸响，洪秀全带着 “拜上帝会” 的信徒一路北上，把半壁江山搅得鸡犬不宁；绿营兵不堪一击，朝堂上老油条扎堆，派去平叛的大臣要么互撕内斗，要么是 “HR 督战销售” 的离谱操作；更要命的是，西方列强虎视眈眈，国内财政空虚，连军饷都得靠地方自筹。
这是一个 “三千年未有之变局” 的开端：曾国藩的湘军异军突起，改变了大清的兵制与权力格局；厘金制度横空出世，让财政权力悄然下移；而咸丰，这位被历史推上风口浪尖的 “苦命天子”，在 “想做事” 与 “做不成事” 之间反复挣扎 —— 他罢免奸臣、起用忠良，却挡不住清军节节败退；他渴望中兴，却只能眼睁睁看着江山破碎。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ef2beb96d862db3a26d0905937cbd083","author":"吉祥如意北京","author_id":"","book_id":"7579153688355146776","book_name":"咸丰皇帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c890","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2468人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7579154185191440920","read_count":"2468","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"404125"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"145","tags":"历史古代,历史,清朝,皇帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o950d4f95c382e2275824c631bb2231e3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253103&x-signature=XWP2mIsKHw%2Bti4M2ypBXMrpKEKk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108952275312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112582340D63CB8016FE4E84A72"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3878,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":360},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"75991888
